DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SCOTT DRAPER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES AND FURTHER RESPONSES OF CERTAIN REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. GRANTED. RESPONDING PARTY MUST PROVIDE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS AND PRODUCE CODE COMPLIANT DOCUMENTS BY JULY 17, 2023. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN AT WILLIAMCLYNN@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses Of Certain Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN DARIN, Esq. of Hunter Pyle Law (Tel: 510-444-4400) for plaintiff, SCOTT DRAPER,
Atty. JONATHAN C. PEARCE, Esq. of Fox Rothschild LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for defendants HAKUNA SERVICES, INC. and DANQI SHEN

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Hearing held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SCOTT DRAPER's Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses Of Certain Requests For Production Of Documents.

Granted. Responding party must provide code compliant responses without objections and produce code compliant documents by July 17, 2023.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem William Lynn at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: William Trupek; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2022 Set For Trial On Nov-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
